title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 34
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear two friends making plans after school.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Are we still watching the football match after school? I brought everything for it. || Girl: I don't think so. The match was cancelled, so it will not work today. || Woman: We could try the library instead. || Girl: I thought about that, but it is closed for repairs. My cousin sent me a message, and [1]we are going skating at the ice rink this afternoon instead[/1]. || Woman: Fine. Shall we meet by the bus stop at four? || Girl: Yes, and bring your student card, because they sometimes ask for it.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Are we still watching the football match after school? I brought everything for it.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I don't think so. The match was cancelled, so it will not work today.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: We could try the library instead.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I thought about that, but it is closed for repairs. My cousin sent me a message, and we are going skating at the ice rink this afternoon instead.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Fine. Shall we meet by the bus stop at four?

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Yes, and bring your student card, because they sometimes ask for it.

questions.question: What will they do this afternoon?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, friends skating on an ice rink, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, friends watching a football match, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: One speaker says they are going skating at the ice rink this afternoon instead.

questions.context: You hear an announcement about the chess club.
questions.audio_script: Speaker: Please listen carefully if you are joining the chess club today. It will not be in its usual place. Some students may go to the canteen, but lunch tables are still in use. Others may wait near the room seven, although it is too small for everyone. [1]Everyone should go straight to the library corner after lunch[/1]. Please tell any friends who arrive late, because the activity will start as soon as the teacher is ready. You do not need to bring anything extra.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: Please listen carefully if you are joining the chess club today. It will not be in its usual place. Some students may go to the canteen, but lunch tables are still in use. Others may wait near the room seven, although it is too small for everyone. Everyone should go straight to the library corner after lunch. Please tell any friends who arrive late, because the activity will start as soon as the teacher is ready. You do not need to bring anything extra.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about something broken in a school bag.
questions.audio_script: Man: Something is broken in the school bag, but I am not sure what. Is it the zip? || Woman: No, it is just stuck. || Man: Maybe it is the calculator. || Woman: I checked that too, and it has new batteries. [1]The problem is the lunch box, because the lid has cracked[/1]. || Man: We should tell someone before it gets worse. || Woman: I already wrote a note, and I will show it to Dad when he gets home. || Woman: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

questions.context: You hear two friends talking about a visit to a activity camp.
questions.audio_script: Woman: What did you do at the activity camp last weekend? I thought you wanted to try canoeing. || Man: I did, but the river was too high. || Woman: Did you do climbing instead? || Man: No, because the wall was closed. In the end, [1]I spent most of the afternoon doing archery[/1]. It was better than I expected. || Woman: I might come next time. || Man: You should. The helpers were friendly, and everything was easy to understand. || Man: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry. || Man: I will send a message now, just in case.

questions.context: You hear two students talking about what to take on a boat trip.
questions.audio_script: Man: Are you ready for the boat trip tomorrow? I was going to pack a towel, because that seemed useful. || Boy: I read the message from school again. You do not need that. || Man: What about a sunglasses? || Boy: Not really. [1]The teacher says everyone should bring a warm jumper because the wind on the water will feel cold[/1]. || Man: Thanks. I will put it in my bag now, before I forget. || Boy: Good plan. We have to leave early in the morning. || Boy: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about travelling to the theatre.
questions.audio_script: Man: How are you getting to the theatre tomorrow? I thought you were going to drive. || Woman: I was, but there is nowhere to park. || Man: Could you use the underground instead? || Woman: I checked, but the station is closed. [1]I am going to walk because it is only ten minutes away[/1]. || Man: That sounds sensible. I will meet you near the entrance when you arrive. || Woman: Great. I will send a message if I am late. || Woman: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

questions.context: You hear two people choosing food at a snack bar.
questions.audio_script: Girl: Have you chosen what to eat at the snack bar? The queue is moving quickly now. || Boy: I nearly chose the muffin, and I also looked at the crisps. || Girl: They both look fine to me. || Boy: Maybe, but I promised to choose something healthier before training. [1]I am going to have the fruit salad[/1]. It should be enough before we leave. || Girl: Good choice. I will order mine after you, and then we can sit near the window. || Girl: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.
